name: Amish Friendship Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Remove 2 cups of starter dough. Keep one cup for starting your next cake and give the other to a friend.
3. To the remaining starter, combine all batter ingredients, mixing well. Pour into two greased or papered glass loaf pans or one 9 X 13-inch pan.
4. If desired, mix Streusel topping and layer batter then streusel twice.
5. Bake for 40-50 minutes, ensuring the cake is done.
Starter:
Mix all ingredients in a glass or plastic container. Cover loosely with a lid or plate. Let stand in a warm place. Stir each day. On the fifth day and the tenth days, add 1 cup flour, 1 cup milk, and 1 cup sugar.
